title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.815 - WO1 Reginald D Cleve Memorial Highway designated in St. Francois County
text:
227.815.  WO1 Reginald D Cleve Memorial Highway designated in St. Francois County. — The portion of U.S. 67 from Perrine Road continuing to Highway H through the city of Farmington in St. Francois County shall be designated the "WO1 Reginald D Cleve Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738)
